ACME CORP — ANNUAL REPORT ON FORM 10-K
Item 1.Business3
Item 1A.Risk Factors10
Item 7.MD&A30
Item 1. Business
ACME designs rockets and sells them worldwide. Our flagship product is the Roadrunner 9000, which accounted for most of our revenue this year.
Item 1A risks are discussed extensively below because our business faces many hazards including anvil supply shortages, desert regulations, and coyote-related litigation that could materially affect results.
Item 1A. Risk Factors
Supply chain: we depend on a single anvil supplier. Any disruption could delay Roadrunner 9000 deliveries.
Fiscal yearRevenueNet income
2025$ 100$ 25
2024$ 80$ 12
Regulatory: desert operations are subject to increasing scrutiny.
Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition
Revenue grew 25% in fiscal 2025 driven by Roadrunner 9000 demand. Refer to "Item 1A. Risk Factors" for hazards.
Item 1.
Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data
Our audited statements follow.
